sentiment.reasoning: The warning of supply chain disruptions directly indicates negative operational impact and potential revenue loss in Europe.

headlines.headline: Relvan Software names new head of cloud infrastructure division

headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels revises long-term strategy with focus on data analytics

sentiment.reasoning: A reported 7% margin improvement is a clear positive financial indicator, directly impacting profitability and investor sentiment.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
